items.name: Builders Club
items.description:
Revved up, nostalgic, and crafted for the early Turbo Builders — the Turbo Builders Club Hard Hat is pure BC era vintage. With its iconic design and builder heritage, it’s perfect for retro avatars, throwback construction builds, and collectors who remember the golden age of Roblox gear.

⚙️ More Retro Builder Hats:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=hard+hat&Category=11&CreatorName=Classic+Limiteds&salesTypeFilter=1

https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about
